overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Max Buffer ETF - June (JUNM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one-year period. The exposure is reset annually in June JUNM was launched on Jun 21, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
